message:
Command `
pkill -9 -f "librelane" 2>/dev/null; pkill -9 -f "openroad" 2>/dev/null; sleep 3
ps aux | grep -E "(openroad|librelane)" | grep -v grep | head -5 || echo "All processes killed"
` executed with exit code -1.

function.arguments:

", "timeout": 15}
function.name: execute_bash
